execution:
Direct via Shopify Admin MCP (graphql_mutation articleUpdate) — appended a `

Related reading

    ...
` section to each of 3 more articles in the back-pain cluster on the mattress-buying-guide blog. Completes the back-pain pillar's inbound link graph from the joint-pain / fibromyalgia / chronic-back side of the cluster.
cms_hygiene: Same pattern as batch 1 (PR #215): fetched canonical bodies via earlier graphql_query batch, generated new bodies locally by appending the Related reading section (preserving every word of merchant-authored content), then articleUpdate via MCP. updatedAt timestamp confirmed after each call, zero userErrors across all 3 mutations.
seo_impact: Completes the inbound-link side of the back-pain pillar's link graph from the chronic-pain / joint / fibromyalgia subcluster. Combined with PR #215's 5 articles, the back-pain pillar now has 8 inbound + 6 outbound internal links from sibling pain-cluster articles. The joint-pain article in particular acts as a secondary anchor — it links to back-pain, hip-pain, shoulder-and-neck-pain, fibromyalgia, AND chronic-pain (5 outbound), creating a meaningful internal-link hub for arthritis / generalized-pain shoppers who don't know they want back-pain specifically.
deferred_reason: The remaining 2 articles (chronic-pain 44KB, shoulder-neck 48KB) combined are ~92KB of body content. Deferring to a batch 3 PR to keep this PR's MCP-call context footprint reasonable. New bodies are already staged in the sandbox at /tmp/pain-cluster-updates/*.body.html with the Related reading sections pre-appended; same articleUpdate mutation pattern will close out the cluster in batch 3.
